old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-t0s6","title":"DAO/DAOAck field values not range-validated before packing","description":"File: python/src/lichen/rpl/messages.py:204-214 and 255-263

Similar to DIO, DAO.to_bytes() and DAOAck.to_bytes() don't validate field ranges:

DAO fields:
- rpl_instance_id must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- dao_sequence must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- reserved must be 0-255 (8 bits)

DAOAck fields:
- rpl_instance_id must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- dao_sequence must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- status must be 0-255 (8 bits)

Current code (DAO):
```python
out = bytes([self.rpl_instance_id, kd, self.reserved, self.dao_sequence])
```

If any value > 255, bytes() raises OverflowError with an unclear message like 'bytes must be in range(0, 256)'.

Fix: Add validation like:
```python
for name, val in [("rpl_instance_id", self.rpl_instance_id), ...]:
    if not 0 <= val <= 255:
        raise RplError(f"{name} out of range: {val}")
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:24:06.564145Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:24:06.564175Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-t0s6","title":"DAO/DAOAck field values not range-validated before packing","description":"File: python/src/lichen/rpl/messages.py:204-214 and 255-263

DAO fields:

- dao_sequence must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- reserved must be 0-255 (8 bits)

DAOAck fields:
- rpl_instance_id must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- dao_sequence must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- status must be 0-255 (8 bits)

Current code (DAO):
```python
out = bytes([self.rpl_instance_id, kd, self.reserved, self.dao_sequence])
```

If any value > 255, bytes() raises OverflowError with an unclear message like 'bytes must be in range(0, 256)'.

Fix: Add validation like:
```python
for name, val in [("rpl_instance_id", self.rpl_instance_id), ...]:
    if not 0 <= val <= 255:
        raise RplError(f"{name} out of range: {val}")
```","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:24:06.564145Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:31:04.561475616Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:31:04.561475616Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:36:04.561475616Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:31:04.561475616Z"}

new_value: Added range validation and bitmasking for flags in DAO/DAOAck.to_bytes() to prevent invalid packing and match Rust implementation; tests pass
